name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Unsigned DLL Loaded from System Directory
notes:
This Building Block triggers when an unsigned DLL file is loaded from C:\Windows\System32.

Update the last rule filter to point to your default system directory if it is not C:Windows\System32.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Unsigned DLL Loaded from System Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Load Success
when the event matches Signed (custom) is any of false
when the event matches File Extension (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)dll
when the event matches File Directory (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)\w:\\windows\\system32.*
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Unsigned DLL Loaded from System Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Load Success
AND when the event matches Signed (custom) is any of false
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)dll
AND when the event matches File Directory (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)\w:\\windows\\system32.*
